series_metadata.series_description: Record of approved Orthotist, Prosthetist, Posthetist-Orthotist, and Pedorthist licenses, including Temporary licenses, LO, LP, LPO, LPED, issued pursuant to ORC Section 4779.09.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain four years after being moved to inactive status or one year after death., Paper: Shred
